title: ace's beautiful adventure modpack
description: a modpack designed to make both the little and big things look good and make the game feel chill but epic when needed, based a lot around a very spaced generation, with vanilla-like new biomes and nice optimisation
body:
[![BoxToPlay sponsor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8b7363c6efe6ca2a42eac08732aedec25d355ab.png)](https://www.boxtoplay.com/en/minecraft-hosting/minecraft-server) Check out BoxToPlay for cheap and powerful minecraft servers (seriously, it's the one I use daily, it's great) A modpack centered around making the minecraft adventure more spaced out. ### mods include: -Terratonic (Terralith+Tectonic), for insane terrain generation that feels the most natural and vanilla-like new biomes (as well as incendium and nullscape)\ -Born In Chaos and Alex's Mobs, for new mobs that feel fitting with a minecraft adventure\ -Yung's End Island, True Ending and End Remastered to make the main quest more interesting\ -Luki's Grand Capitals, all of Yung's mods, Forsaken and Repurposed Structures to make exploring stuctures just that much better (forsaken's seem to generate extremely rarely though)\ -Physics Mod and Distant Horizons to make the game look scrumptious\ -Majrusz's mods, to add a tiny bit of magic\ -A LOT of QOL mods\ -quite a lot of optimisation mods so your pc doesn't blow up\ -This modpack also includes e4mc, which makes playing with friends extremely easy, simply open the pause menu and open to LAN and the mod will give you a URL that you can send to your friends (they need to also have the modpack obviously) go support skye on her ko-fi !!!! I highly recommend replacing the physics mod with the pro version as I am not allowed to use it in my modpack but it is free, it's a great mod so you should also consider supporting haubna on his ko-fi You may not republish this modpack, please use the link to this page
list of non modrinth projects (for now, only the projects that required me to link them)

Born In Chaos
Spelunker's Charm
Visual Titles (Yung's Traveler's Titles rp)
Disenchanting[SWAPPED SINCE 1.0.3]
Vanilla Tweaks rp

report bugs or crashes to me on discord
